title: A Complete Introduction to Go Testing
summary: In Go, test files are usually located in the same package as the source files being tested, and follow these naming conventions: Source file: xxx.go Test file: xxx_test.go Test file names must end with _test.go so that the Go toolchain can recognize and treat them as test files. Test functions must have the following signature: func TestXxx(t *testing.T) ...
